title: Suscraft Recharged
description: A modpack that enhances and optimises the Minecraft experience, offering a richer, more immersive gameplay experience.
body: Suscraft Renewed is an enhanced and optimised Minecraft modpack designed to enrich your gameplay experience with a balanced mix of performance improvements, quality-of-life upgrades, and exciting new content. It includes mods like Simply Optimized, Lithium, and Phosphor for smoother performance, while AppleSkin, Inventory Tweaks Renewed, and JEI streamline crafting and inventory management. Explore new biomes with Biomes O' Plenty, forge custom tools with Tinkers' Construct, and expand your farming with Farmer's Delight and Pam's HarvestCraft. Delve into magic with Botania, discover new dimensions with Twilight Forest, and build intricate structures using Chisel and Decocraft. For adventurers, Roguelike Dungeons and Waystones offer thrilling new challenges and easy travel options. Whether you're an explorer, builder, farmer, or everyday player, Suscraft Renewed provides a richer, more engaging Minecraft experience that revitalises every aspect of the game.
